title: T-018 — UI: Six Big Losses tab + Changeover Analysis tab inside OEE-003 (15-OEE-d, OEE-005 slice)
prompt:
# T-018 — Six Big Losses + Changeover tabs

PRD: docs/prd/15-OEE-PRD.md §15.5 OEE-003.T2/T3, §13.3 (downtime category colors), §15.4 OEE-M-005 (mapping), Auditor A OEE-005 slice (Pareto interim home)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototypes: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/dashboard.jsx:200-306 (six_big_losses_tab), :308-390 (changeover_tab)

## Goal
Two composite components consumed by T-016 OEE-003 page: (1) `<SixBigLossesTab>` rendering Pareto bar chart from big_loss_categories + per-impact A/P/Q totals + downtime_events table with [Add note] (OEE-M-001 trigger); (2) `<ChangeoverTab>` rendering 4 KPI mini-cards + changeover_events table with allergen-risk Badge + variance Badge + [View] trigger (OEE-M-006). Both tabs match prototype 1:1. Per §15.5: T2 is the P1 interim home for Pareto loss view while OEE-P2-C `/oee/pareto` remains placeholder.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/(oee)/summary/_components/six-big-losses-tab.tsx`: Server Component (RSC) reads SQL aggregation grouped by big_loss_category + impact_dimension from downtime_events; renders Pareto BarChart (recharts) + A/P/Q totals + downtime_events table with [Add note] / [Edit] buttons triggering OEE-M-001 (covered by T-020 modal suite — this task wires trigger only).
2. `apps/web/app/(oee)/summary/_components/changeover-tab.tsx`: RSC reads changeover_events aggregation for the date + per-line; 4 KPI mini-cards (total, avg, high-allergen count, longest); table with allergen_risk Badge (cva variant) + variance Badge + [View] trigger.
3. `<VarianceBadge>` shared primitive: sign-aware color (positive=red, negative=green for downtime context); placed in `apps/web/app/(oee)/_components/variance-badge.tsx`.
4. Allergen risk Badge cva variant: High=red, Medium=amber, Low=green per §13.3.
5. Hardcoded labels via next-intl `t('oee.losses.*')`, `t('oee.changeover.*')`, `t('oee.bigLoss.<code>')` (i18n keys created here; English defaults).
6. RTL test snapshot + parity checklist per tab against prototype line ranges.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(oee)/summary/_components/six-big-losses-tab.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/summary/_components/changeover-tab.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/_components/variance-badge.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/summary/_components/__tests__/six-big-losses-tab.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/summary/_components/__tests__/changeover-tab.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/dashboard.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production `<SixBigLossesTab>` renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/dashboard.jsx:200-306 (six_big_losses_tab), then it has the Pareto BarChart + A/P/Q totals + downtime_events table with [Add note]/[Edit] columns — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist.
2. Given the production `<ChangeoverTab>` renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/dashboard.jsx:308-390 (changeover_tab), then it has 4 KPI mini-cards + table with allergen_risk Badge (High=red/Medium=amber/Low=green per §13.3) + variance Badge + [View] button — verified by RTL parity checklist.
3. Given a downtime_events row exists with category='BREAKDOWN', when SixBigLossesTab is queried, then the Pareto bar for BREAKDOWN aggregates server-side via SQL GROUP BY (not client reduce — translation note).
4. Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact + Playwright trace for both tabs per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; <VarianceBadge> primitive is reused (not inline conditional logic per tab).

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL test per tab asserting parity + server-side aggregation contract + Badge color mapping.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run app/(oee)/summary/_components`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not use client-side Array.reduce for A/P/Q totals — server SQL aggregation per translation note.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not hardcode allergen_risk colors inline — use shared cva variant map; same for VarianceBadge.
- Do not skip OEE-M-005 (Big Loss Mapping) trigger button on SixBigLossesTab — wires to T-021 OEE-ADM-001 modal.
- Do not duplicate Pareto rendering — out-of-scope OEE-P2-C reuses this component (per §15.5 P1 interim home).
